InEuint64","name":"encCeiling","type":"tuple"}],"name":"submitBid","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Extends the Concord protocol to support N buyers bidding against a single seller.      All bids and the floor price remain fully encrypted. The contract uses a pairwise      FHE comparison tournament to find the highest eligible bid, then computes the      midpoint settlement price \u2014 all in ciphertext.      FHE Circuit (computeAuction):        1. For each bid: FHE.gte(ceiling, floor) \u2014 eligibility check        2. Tournament bracket: pairwise FHE.gte between eligible bids        3. FHE.select to pick the highest eligible bid        4. Midpoint: FHE.div(FHE.add(floor, bestBid), 2)      Max bidders capped at 10 to control gas costs.      Network: Base Sepolia (CoFHE-supported)","kind":"dev","methods":{"computeAuction(bytes32)":{"details":"Runs the full tournament bracket in ciphertext:      1. Check each bid against the floor (eligibility)      2. Pairwise compare eligible bids (find highest)      3. Compute midpoint between floor and best bid      Gas cost scales ~O(N\u00b2) with number of bids.      Only callable after deadline or when maxBidders reached."},"createAuction(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,uint8,bytes),uint8,uint256,uint8)":{"params":{"auctionId":"Unique auction identifier computeAuction(bytes32).details: Runs the full tournament bracket in ciphertext:      1. Check each bid against the floor (eligibility)      2. Pairwise compare eligible bids (find highest)      3. Compute midpoint between floor and best bid      Gas cost scales ~O(N²) with number of bids.      Only callable after deadline or when maxBidders reached.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp — bidding window closes after this

params._matched: Whether any bid met the floor
params._winner: Address of the winning bidder (0x0 if no match)
params.auctionId: The auction to publish results for

computeAuction(bytes32).notice: Trigger the FHE computation after bidding closes.

createAuction(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,uin.notice: Seller creates a sealed-bid auction with their encrypted floor price.

publishResult(bytes32,bool,uint64,addres.notice: Publish the decrypted auction result on-chain.

submitBid(bytes32,(uint256,uint8,uint8,b.notice: Submit an encrypted ceiling bid to an open auction.
